Name: Jasper PCT Events
Description: General-purpose Pictomancer event profile for PvE. Broken references and field-content-specific events were removed for stable roulette and raid use.

Events.Name: Addle & Tempera Coat
Events.Description: Uses Addle plus job mitigation on raidwide damage.

Conditions.Name: Target No Addle
Conditions.Description: Target does not already have Addle or equivalent magic damage down.

Logics.Name: Addle & Tempera Coat
Logics.Description: Magic raidwide mitigation without a single-target enemy-count gate.

Items.Name: Variable Holds
Items.Description: Toggle Reset, Group Hold, Boss Hold
